name: codex-orchestration
description: Keep the current Codex model as orchestrator, add an optional plan advisor, and route eligible work to efficient executors.

interface.shortDescription: Optional plan advisor plus efficient executors
interface.longDescription: Keep the current session model as Codex's root orchestrator, optionally review non-trivial plans through a read-only advisor, and route compatible native subagent work to an efficient executor.
defaultPrompt: /codex-orchestration executor: GPT-5.6 Luna xhigh, advisor: Anthropic Fable 5 xhigh
$codex-orchestration:codex-orchestration ask me which executor to use and whether I want an optional advisor; keep the current session model as orchestrator.
$codex-orchestration:codex-orchestration persist my executor and optional advisor roles for this project without changing the root model.
